pages.title: Jeep Seat Covers
pages.body_html:
Jeep Seat Covers — Made in the USA

Bartact Jeep seat covers are built for owners who actually use their Jeeps. Whether you drive a Wrangler TJ, JK, JL, or a Gladiator, our covers are designed around specific model years for a tight fit, clean look, and long-term durability. They are made in the USA in Southern California using premium materials chosen for real trail use, daily driving, and years of sun, dirt, and abuse.

Our lineup uses high-grade UV-protected polyester and select 1000D Cordura nylon, paired with waterproof polyurethane backing, foam padding, and double or triple stitching at stress points. The result is a seat cover that protects your factory upholstery while still feeling solid and comfortable on the road. Many Bartact Jeep seat covers also include MOLLE storage panels for added organization without wasting cabin space.

Fitment matters. Jeep seat covers are not one-size-fits-all, especially when you factor in different seat shapes, trim variations, and side airbag requirements. Bartact patterns each application around the actual Jeep seats for that generation, helping the covers stay in place and look like they belong in the vehicle instead of sitting on top of it.

If you are shopping by model, start with our Jeep Wrangler seat covers collection for the broad Wrangler lineup or go straight to Jeep Gladiator seat covers for JT trucks. If you need generation-specific fitment, browse TJ seat cover options, JK / JKU seat covers, or JL / JLU seat covers to find the right match for your Jeep.

Every Bartact seat cover is built to protect your investment, improve utility, and hold up where cheap universal covers fail. If you want Jeep seat covers that are actually made for Jeep owners, this is where to start.

pages.title: Jeep Wrangler Seat Cover FAQ
pages.body_html:
Jeep Wrangler Seat Cover FAQ

Find answers to the most common questions about Bartact seat covers for the Jeep Wrangler JK and JL models. Whether you're looking for fitment information, material details, or installation tips, we've got you covered.

Do Bartact seat covers fit my Jeep Wrangler?

Yes! Bartact manufactures custom-fit seat covers for all Jeep Wrangler models from 1997 to present. We offer covers specifically designed for the TJ (1997-2006), JK (2007-2010 and 2011-2018), and JL (2018+) generations. Each cover is precision-engineered using the exact dimensions and contours of your specific model year's seats, ensuring a tight, factory-like fit with no bunching, sagging, or loose material.

Are Bartact seat covers made in the USA?

Absolutely. Every Bartact seat cover is 100% Made in the USA. We design, cut, and sew all of our products at our facility in Southern California. We're proud to support American manufacturing and use domestically-sourced materials whenever possible. This commitment to American craftsmanship is a core part of who we are — it's not just a label, it's our standard.

Do Bartact seat covers work with heated seats?

Yes, Bartact seat covers are fully compatible with factory heated seats in all Jeep Wrangler models that offer them. Our covers are designed to allow heat to transfer through the material effectively, so you won't lose any heating performance. Many customers report no noticeable difference in heat output after installing Bartact covers.

Are Bartact seat covers compatible with side airbags?

Yes. All Bartact seat covers for the Jeep Wrangler are designed with airbag compatibility in mind. Our covers feature specially engineered seams along the airbag deployment zones that are designed to tear away cleanly when the side airbag deploys, ensuring your safety is never compromised. This is a critical feature that many cheaper seat cover brands overlook.

How do I install Bartact seat covers on my Jeep Wrangler?

Bartact seat covers are designed for easy, at-home installation with no special tools required. Most customers complete the installation in 30-60 minutes per seat. Each set comes with detailed, vehicle-specific instructions. The covers slip over your existing seats and secure with straps, hooks, and elastic cords underneath. For best results, we recommend doing the install on a warm day when the material is more pliable, and taking your time to tuck all edges neatly for a clean finished look.

What's the difference between Bartact and other Jeep Wrangler seat covers?

Several key factors set Bartact apart from competitors like Smittybilt, Coverking, and others. First, every Bartact cover is Made in the USA using military-grade materials — most competitors manufacture overseas. Second, our signature MOLLE (Modular Lightweight Load-carrying Equipment) webbing integration lets you attach tactical pouches, gear, and accessories directly to your seat backs. Third, our custom-fit designs are engineered from actual vehicle seats, not generic patterns. Finally, our material quality — we use 1000D Cordura and mil-spec fabrics that are built to withstand years of trail abuse, UV exposure, and daily wear.

Do Bartact seat covers have MOLLE webbing?

Yes! MOLLE webbing is one of Bartact's signature features. Our tactical seat covers feature genuine MOLLE (Modular Lightweight Load-carrying Equipment) webbing on the seat backs, allowing you to attach MOLLE-compatible pouches, holsters, organizers, and other tactical accessories. This is the same webbing system used by the U.S. Military on their tactical gear. It's incredibly versatile for organizing gear on the trail, whether you're carrying tools, first aid kits, radios, or anything else you need accessible.

What material are Bartact seat covers made from?

Bartact seat covers are constructed from premium mil-spec fabrics, including 1000-denier (1000D) Cordura nylon — the same material used in military tactical gear and backpacks. This material is exceptionally resistant to abrasion, tearing, punctures, and UV fading. We also use heavy-duty marine-grade thread and reinforced stitching at all stress points. The combination of materials and construction creates a seat cover that can handle anything the trail throws at it while still looking great for years.

How do I clean Bartact seat covers?

Bartact seat covers are incredibly easy to maintain. For routine cleaning, simply wipe them down with a damp cloth or use a mild soap and water solution. For deeper cleaning, you can remove the covers and hand wash them or use a gentle cycle in a washing machine with cold water and mild detergent. Allow them to air dry — do not put them in a dryer. For tough stains like mud, grease, or food, a soft brush with soap and water works well. The Cordura material is naturally resistant to staining and is very easy to keep clean.

What is Bartact's warranty on Jeep Wrangler seat covers?

Bartact stands behind every product we make. Our seat covers come with a manufacturer's warranty that covers defects in materials and workmanship. We're confident in the durability of our products because we use the highest-quality materials and construction techniques available. If you ever have an issue with your Bartact seat covers, our customer service team in Southern California is ready to help at 951-319-4008.

Not sure which material is right for you?

Compare Bartact Patriot Fabric vs Cordura vs 6 other materials — rated across 10 categories.

View Material Comparison Chart →

pages.title: llms.txt
pages.body_html:
# Bartact
> High-end tactical seat covers and accessories for off-road vehicles. 100% Made in USA. Based in Southern California.

## About
Bartact is a premium American manufacturer of tactical seat covers, MOLLE-integrated accessories, and off-road interior gear. Founded and operated in Southern California, Bartact designs and manufactures all products in the United States using military-grade materials and construction techniques.

Bartact began by leveraging years of experience in commercial and U.S. Military product manufacturing. The brand was introduced at the SEMA Show in Las Vegas and has since become the go-to choice for off-road enthusiasts who demand the highest quality, most rugged, and most versatile seat covers and accessories available.

## Products

### Seat Covers
- Tactical seat covers with MOLLE webbing integration
- Available for front and rear seats
- Custom-fit for specific vehicle makes, models, and years
- Made from 1000D Cordura or mil-spec materials
- Compatible with heated seats and side airbags
- Multiple color combinations available

### Vehicle Compatibility
- Jeep Wrangler (JK 2007-2010, JK 2011-2012, JK 2013-2018, JL 2018+)
- Jeep Gladiator (JT 2021+)
- Toyota Tacoma (2005-2015, 2016-2023)
- Toyota 4Runner (2010-2024)
- Ford Bronco Full-Size (2021+)

### Accessories
- Paracord grab handles (door and headrest)
- Plastic grab handles
- MOLLE door bags and storage bags
- Center console covers
- Fire extinguisher holders
- Limit straps
- MOLLE panel accessories and pouches

## Key Facts
- 100% Made in USA — designed, cut, and sewn in Southern California
- Military-grade materials and construction
- Tactical MOLLE webbing integration on seat covers and accessories
- Custom-fit designs for each specific vehicle application
- Compatible with factory heated seats
- Compatible with factory side airbags
- Over 258,000 Facebook followers
- Over 13,500 Instagram followers

pages.title: Shipping Policy
pages.body_html:
Shipping Policy

Processing Time

Most in-stock orders are processed and shipped within 1-3 business days. Custom seat covers and made-to-order items may take 5-10 business days to manufacture before shipping.

Shipping Methods & Rates

We ship via USPS, UPS, and FedEx depending on the size and weight of your order. Shipping rates are calculated at checkout based on your location and selected shipping method.

  • Standard Shipping: 5-7 business days (continental US)
  • Expedited Shipping: 2-3 business days (when available)
  • Free Shipping: Available on select items and promotions

Where We Ship

We currently ship to all 50 US states and US territories. International shipping is available to select countries. International customers are responsible for any customs duties, taxes, or import fees imposed by their country.

Order Tracking

Once your order ships, you will receive an email with tracking information. You can also check your order status by logging into your account on our website.

Shipping Damage

If your order arrives damaged, please contact us within 48 hours of delivery at orders@bartact.com with photos of the damage. We will arrange a replacement or refund.

Address Changes

If you need to change your shipping address, please contact us as soon as possible. Once an order has shipped, we cannot modify the delivery address.

Contact Us

For shipping questions, email orders@bartact.com or call (951) 973-8850 during business hours (Monday-Friday, 8 AM - 5 PM PST).

Proudly designed, developed, and shipped from Southern California, USA.
